mapper.select:
SELECT vhi.hr_id, vhi.hr_nm, vhi.sex_div, vhi.birth_dt, vhi.sabun, vhi.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm, toi.ord_seq as seq, jbrp.ord_seq as jbrpSeq, vhi.jbrp, vhi.part_comp_id, tpci.part_comp_nm, vhi.working_at, vhi.fire_at, vhi.remark, vhi.use_yn, vhi.created_at, vhi.created_by, vhi.updated_at, vhi.updated_by, vhi.user_id, vhi.risk_ass_role, vhi.ord_seq, vhi.zip_cd, vhi.addrs1, vhi.addrs2, vhi.email, vhi.phone, vhi.signature, vhi.auth_group_cd as role, ( SELECT STRING_AGG(traocor.orgn_role_nm, ', ' ORDER BY traocor.orgn_role_nm) FROM esg.tb_safety_duties_doc_user tsddu LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_duties_doc tsdd ON tsddu.write_year = tsdd.write_year AND tsddu.doc_no = tsdd.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart_orgn_role traocor ON tsdd.comp_id = traocor.comp_id AND tsdd.orgn_role_id = traocor.orgn_role_id AND traocor.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE vhi.hr_id = tsddu.hr_id ) AS risk_ass_role_nm, jbrp.jbrp_nm, sf.file_id as logo_id, ( SELECT comp_id FROM esg.tb_company_info ci WHERE ci.comp_id = ( SELECT tcm2.comp_id FROM esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map tcm2 WHERE tcm2.hr_id = vhi.hr_id AND tcm2.orgn_comp_yn = 'Y' ) ) AS affCompId, ( SELECT comp_nm FROM esg.tb_company_info ci WHERE ci.comp_id = ( SELECT tcm2.comp_id FROM esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map tcm2 WHERE tcm2.hr_id = vhi.hr_id AND tcm2.orgn_comp_yn = 'Y' ) ) AS affCompNm FROM esg.v_hr_info vhi left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = vhi.jbrp AND jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON toi.orgn_id = vhi.orgn_id -- 조직 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_partner_comp_info tpci ON tpci.part_comp_id = vhi.part_comp_id -- 파일 location LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_id = vhi.hr_id AND sf.target_type='hrImg' inner join esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map tcm ON tcm.comp_id = #{compId} and tcm.hr_id = vhi.hr_id and tcm.orgn_comp_yn = 'Y' WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY vhi.use_yn DESC, toi.ord_seq asc, jbrp.ord_seq asc, vhi.ord_seq asc

SELECT vhi.hr_id, vhi.hr_nm, vhi.sex_div, vhi.birth_dt, vhi.sabun, vhi.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm, vhi.jbrp, vhi.part_comp_id, tpci.part_comp_nm, vhi.working_at, vhi.fire_at, vhi.remark, vhi.use_yn, vhi.created_at, vhi.created_by, vhi.updated_at, vhi.updated_by, vhi.user_id, vhi.risk_ass_role, vhi.ord_seq, vhi.zip_cd, vhi.addrs1, vhi.addrs2, vhi.email, vhi.phone, vhi.signature, jbrp.jbrp_nm, sf.file_id, tci.max_hr_count, ( SELECT STRING_AGG(traocor.orgn_role_nm, ', ' ORDER BY traocor.orgn_role_nm) FROM esg.tb_safety_duties_doc_user tsddu LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_duties_doc tsdd ON tsddu.write_year = tsdd.write_year AND tsddu.doc_no = tsdd.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart_orgn_role traocor ON tsdd.comp_id = traocor.comp_id AND tsdd.orgn_role_id = traocor.orgn_role_id AND traocor.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE vhi.hr_id = tsddu.hr_id ) AS risk_ass_role_nm FROM esg.v_hr_info vhi LEFT JOIN esg.tb_partner_comp_info tpci ON tpci.part_comp_id = vhi.part_comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON toi.orgn_id = vhi.orgn_id -- 파일 location LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf on sf.target_id = #{hrId} and sf.target_type='hrImg' -- 직위 nm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = vhi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = (SELECT comp_id FROM esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map WHERE hr_id = #{hrId} AND orgn_comp_yn = 'Y') LEFT JOIN esg.tb_company_info tci ON tci.comp_id = (SELECT comp_id FROM esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map WHERE hr_id = #{hrId} AND orgn_comp_yn = 'Y') WHERE 1=1 AND vhi.hr_id = #{hrId}
SELECT a.comp_id, b.comp_nm, a.orgn_comp_yn FROM esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map a left join esg.tb_company_info b on a.comp_id = b.comp_id WHERE 1=1 AND a.hr_id = #{hrId} AND a.use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT thcm.comp_id as id, tci.comp_nm as nm FROM esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map thcm left join esg.tb_company_info tci on tci.comp_id = thcm.comp_id WHERE 1=1 AND thcm.hr_id = #{hrId} AND thcm.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT c.comp_id, COALESCE(#{hrId}, '') AS hrId, c.max_hr_count AS maxHrCount, COALESCE(h.use_yn, 'Y') AS useYn, COUNT(CASE WHEN h_all.use_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS hrCount FROM esg.tb_company_info c LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map m ON m.comp_id = c.comp_id AND m.orgn_comp_yn = 'Y' AND m.hr_id = #{hrId} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info h ON h.hr_id = m.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map m_all ON m_all.comp_id = c.comp_id AND m_all.orgn_comp_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info h_all ON h_all.hr_id = m_all.hr_id WHERE c.comp_id = #{compId} GROUP BY c.comp_id, c.max_hr_count, h.use_yn;
mapper.insert:
WITH current_date_info AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS today, COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(hr_id, 9, 4)::INTEGER), 0) AS max_sequence FROM esg.tb_hr_info WHERE SUBSTRING(hr_id, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT today || CASE WHEN max_sequence = 0 THEN '0001' ELSE CASE WHEN max_sequence < 9999 THEN LPAD((max_sequence + 1)::TEXT, 4, '0') ELSE '0001' -- 시퀀스가 9999에 도달하면 재시작 END END AS hrId FROM current_date_info;
INSERT INTO esg.tb_hr_info ( hr_id, hr_nm, sex_div, birth_dt, sabun, orgn_id, jbrp, part_comp_id, working_at, fire_at, remark, user_id, risk_ass_role, created_at, created_by, use_yn, ord_seq, zip_cd, addrs1, addrs2 ) VALUES ( #{hrId}, #{hrNm}, #{sexDiv}, #{birthDt}, #{sabun}, #{orgnId}, #{jbrp}, #{partCompId}, #{workingAt}, #{fireAt}, #{remark}, #{userId}, #{riskAssRole}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, #{zipCd}, #{addrs1}, #{addrs2} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_hr_info SET hr_nm = #{hrNm}, sex_div = #{sexDiv}, birth_dt = #{birthDt}, sabun = #{sabun}, orgn_id = #{orgnId}, jbrp = #{jbrp}, part_comp_id = #{partCompId}, working_at = #{workingAt}, fire_at = #{fireAt}, remark = #{remark}, user_id = #{userId}, risk_ass_role = #{riskAssRole}, use_yn = #{useYn}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, zip_cd = #{zipCd}, addrs1 = #{addrs1}, addrs2 = #{addrs2}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE hr_id = #{hrId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_hr_info WHERE 1=1 AND hr_id = #{hrId}
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_user_info SET user_nm = #{userNm}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT thoh.*, toi.orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_hr_orgn_hi thoh left join esg.tb_orgn_info toi on toi.orgn_id = thoh.orgn_id WHERE 1=1 AND thoh.hr_id = #{hrId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_hr_orgn_hi ( hr_id, orgn_id, st_date, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{hrId}, #{orgnId}, #{stDate}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT hr_id as id, target_type, target_id, gubun, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM esg.tb_hr_incharge_map WHERE 1=1 AND target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType}

SELECT vhi.*, thim.gubun, sf.file_id as logo_id, toi.orgn_nm, jbrp.jbrp_nm, thim.target_id FROM esg.tb_hr_incharge_map thim LEFT JOIN esg.v_hr_info vhi ON vhi.hr_id = thim.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf on sf.target_id = thim.hr_id and sf.target_type='hrImg' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi on toi.orgn_id = vhi.orgn_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = vhi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} WHERE 1=1 AND thim.target_id = #{targetId} AND thim.target_type = #{targetType} AND thim.use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_hr_incharge_map ( target_type, target_id, gubun, hr_id, created_at, created_by, use_yn ) VALUES ( #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{gubun}, #{id}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{useYn} )
mapper.select: select t1.* from esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp t1 where t1.comp_id = #{compId} order by t1.use_yn desc, t1.ord_seq asc
select t1.* , true as checked from dataset.tb_dataset_hr_info_jbrp t1 where t1.use_yn = 'Y' order by t1.ord_seq asc
mapper.insert:
select case when #{jbrpId} is null or #{jbrpId} = '' then to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((coalesce(max(substring(jbrp_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') else #{jbrpId} end as jbrpId from esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp where jbrp_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' and comp_id = #{compId}
insert into esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp ( comp_id, jbrp_id, jbrp_nm, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{compId}, #{jbrpId}, #{jbrpNm}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: update esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp set jbrp_nm = #{jbrpNm}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} where jbrp_id = #{jbrpId} AND comp_id = #{compId}
update esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp set use_yn = 'N', updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} where jbrp_id = #{jbrpId} AND comp_id = #{compId}
mapper.select: select user_id from esg.v_hr_info where hr_id = #{hrId}
mapper.update: update esg.tb_user_info set user_ps = #{userPs}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} where user_id = #{userId}
